basic_details.job_title: HARTRON Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Manager, Accounts Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd (HARTRON)
basic_details.short_information: Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Ltd (HARTRON) has released the official Accounts Personnel Notification 2026. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the HARTRON Accounts Personnel Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 42 years of age with a qualification of M.Com from a recognized University/Institution with relevant experience can apply offline on or before 18 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit - 42 years for all posts.
age_limit.details: Manager: Maximum age limit is 42 years. Accounts Assistant: Maximum age limit is 42 years.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Com from a recognized University/Institution with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Manager: M.Com from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 05 years' post-qualification experience in accounting, finance, taxation, audit, budgeting, financial reporting and statutory compliance functions in Government Departments, Boards, Corporations, Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) or reputed private organizations. Accounts Assistant: M.Com from a recognized University/Institution. Minimum 02 years' post-qualification experience in accounting, finance, taxation or related functions in Government Departments, Boards, Corporations, Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) or reputed private organizations.

salary_details.pay_scale: Manager: Rs.50,000/- per month plus Rs.5,000/- allowances; Accounts Assistant: Rs.30,000/- plus Rs.5,000/- allowances
salary_details.manager: Rs.50,000/- per month plus Rs.5,000/- as allowances
salary_details.accounts assistant: Rs.30,000/- per month plus Rs.5,000/- p.m. as allowances

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HARTRON Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.hartron.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HARTRON Accounts Personnel Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for HARTRON Accounts Personnel Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Manager post, candidates must possess an M.Com degree from a recognized University/Institution with at least 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Accounts Personnel?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Accounts Personnel posts, comprising 2 for Manager and 1 for Accounts Assistant.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Accounts Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Accounts Assistant post is 42 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for HARTRON Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 1,180/-.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the HARTRON Accounts Personnel positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the prescribed proforma along with testimonials and demand draft to the P&A Division, Hartron Bhawan, Panchkula.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The Manager post offers a salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month plus Rs. 5,000/- as allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The Accounts Personnel positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of HARTRON, www.hartron.org.in.
